# Horwich Sewing SK

> European contract manufacturer of workwear, protective and technical garments — fully factored and CMT (cut, make & trim), since 1988. UK-headquartered, manufacturing in Slovakia inside the EU and NATO. ISO 9001 & 14001 certified. Delivered worldwide.

## Key facts
- Established 1988; owner-led since the 2019 management buyout by Albert and Lenka.
- Products: workwear, PPE, fire-protective and arc-flash garments, chemical-protection suits, military and defence garments, disposable/non-woven protective clothing, anti-allergic bed and table linen.
- Services: design and technical packs, fabric sourcing, pattern making, computerised cutting, all forms of sewing and welding, embroidery; fully factored or CMT.
- Capacity and performance: 30,000+ garments per week; 99.1% on-time delivery; typical 6-week lead times; modular manufacturing with surge capacity; SAP ERP batch traceability.
- Locations: UK office — Riverside Mill, Mountbatten Way, Congleton, Cheshire, CW12 1DY. Manufacturing — Bratislavská 3225, 908 51 Holíč, Slovakia (plus satellite capacity in Macedonia and a network of trusted outsourcers).
- Certifications: ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 14001:2015 (SGS). Working toward Cyber Essentials, JOSCAR, AQAP 2110 and an NCAGE code for defence supply.
- Contact: info@horwichsewingsk.com · UK +44 330 133 2115 · Slovakia +421 34 668 47 47.

## Pages
- [Home](https://www.horwichsewingsk.com/): overview and key facts.
- [Our story](https://www.horwichsewingsk.com/about.html): heritage since 1988, Kimberley-Clark roots, 2019 management buyout, owners and values.
- [What we do](https://www.horwichsewingsk.com/what-we-do.html): fully factored vs CMT, the eight-step manufacturing process and capabilities.
- [Products](https://www.horwichsewingsk.com/products.html): garments and industries served.
- [Defence](https://www.horwichsewingsk.com/defence.html): defence and military garment manufacturing, provenance and resilience.
- [Compliance & accreditations](https://www.horwichsewingsk.com/compliance.html): certifications, standards, traceability, security and supply-chain resilience.
- [Social value](https://www.horwichsewingsk.com/social-value.html): economic, skills, environmental and community contribution.
- [Responsible sourcing](https://www.horwichsewingsk.com/responsible-sourcing.html): modern-slavery and ethical-sourcing commitments.
- [Crafter by Horwich](https://www.horwichsewingsk.com/crafter.html): own-brand workwear collection.
- [Contact](https://www.horwichsewingsk.com/contact.html): request a quote.
